injury.onset.headline: ${player.name} ruled out — ${injury.durationDays} days
injury.onset.subhead: ${team.name} suffer major blow as ${player.primaryRole} stretchered off
body: ${team.name} have been dealt a significant setback as ${player.name} was forced off the field with a severe ${injury.type} injury during the match.
Medical staff have confirmed the ${player.primaryRole} will be unavailable for the next ${injury.durationDays} days, missing an estimated ${impact.missesMatches} fixtures.
The player is expected to return to availability on ${impact.nextAvailableDate}. Coaching staff will be assessing replacement options in the coming days.

injury.onset.headline: ${player.name} sidelined with ${injury.type} injury
body: ${player.name} picked up a ${injury.type} injury during ${team.name}'s recent fixture and will be unavailable for an extended period.
Initial assessments suggest a ${injury.durationDays}-day recovery window, likely sidelining the ${player.primaryRole} for around ${impact.missesMatches} matches.
The medical team has scheduled a return-to-play review for ${impact.nextAvailableDate}.

injury.onset.headline: ${player.name} picks up minor knock
body: ${player.name} sustained a minor ${injury.type} issue and will be unavailable for the next ${injury.durationDays} days.
The ${player.primaryRole} is expected back in contention by ${impact.nextAvailableDate}.

injury.recovery.headline: ${player.name} cleared to return
body: ${player.name} has been declared fully fit following a successful rehabilitation programme and is available for ${team.name}'s next fixture.
The ${player.primaryRole} has completed all required fitness benchmarks and rejoins the senior squad effective immediately.
